entities.name: CROP WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild relatives of cultivated crops that provide valuable traits and genes for breeding

entities.name: TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics provided by crop wild relatives to enhance crop performance

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Genetic units from crop wild relatives used to boost resilience and production

entities.name: CROP RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of crops to withstand environmental stress and pests

entities.name: GLOBAL AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total output of agricultural crops on a worldwide scale

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing new crop varieties with desired characteristics

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism to identify valuable genetic resources

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall goal of enhancing crop quality, yield, and resilience

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species or breeding pool

entities.name: BREEDING POOLS
entities.description: The collection of genetic material available to breeders for developing new varieties

entities.name: FAVORABLE ALLELES
entities.description: Specific versions of genes that provide beneficial traits to the crop

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time through breeding

entities.name: SEQUENCE INFORMATION
entities.description: Data obtained from sequencing genomes used to identify genetic targets

entities.name: WILD GENOMES
entities.description: The complete genetic material of crop wild relatives

entities.name: GENE-EDITING TOOLS
entities.description: Precise technologies used to modify the DNA of organisms

entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTION AND MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Data-informed approaches to gathering and preserving genetic resources

entities.name: POLICY SUPPORT
entities.description: Institutional and governmental frameworks that facilitate access to genetic resources

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY TARGETS
entities.description: Global goals to ensure all people have access to sufficient and nutritious food
